title: Grammy Award: Best Rap Album - Grammy.com
text: Grammy.com official page for the Best Rap Album award category. The Best Rap Album award is one of the major categories at the Grammy Awards, recognizing excellence in rap music albums. The category was established in the mid-1990s and has become a flagship award recognizing the diverse range of hip-hop and rap artists. For the 2026 Grammy Awards, the nominees for Best Rap Album include some of the most significant releases in hip-hop from 2024-2025. The award recognizes artists and projects that demonstrate technical skill, lyrical excellence, production quality, and cultural significance. Past winners have included some of the greatest artists in hip-hop history, and the category continues to evolve with the changing landscape of the genre.
